category_sources: source_facts.description says patched GNU dd for forensic acquisition; SourceForge project page describes forensic/digital evidence acquisition features.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dc3dd; official SourceForge project title is dc3dd.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available documentation surface, describing features, files, support, and project code.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge Code tab exposes the project source tree.
tags_sources: SourceForge lists forensic acquisition, hashing, split output files, pattern writing, and file verification; current_curation.tags includes cli.
